completed: Replaced direct Google Sheets CSV loading with local Flask proxy API endpoint /api/admin/users
Created custom server-side CSV parser in Python Flask inside app.py
Added file-based persistent overrides for editing users in data/edited_users.json
Added file-based persistent overrides for deleting users in data/deleted_users.json
Implemented secure, premium modal forms for View User and Edit User details with backdrop blurs and modern styling
Wired Edit, Delete, and View action buttons in admin.js to trigger Flask CRUD endpoints
Added dynamic range-randomizer cache-buster to static script injection in templates/admin/dashboard.html to prevent developer stale script issues
Modified Personal Dashboard's profile picture update flow to accept external URLs and Google Drive links instead of local files
Designed and implemented an elegant Change Profile Picture Modal in templates/profile.html with glassmorphism styling, clean inputs, and the user-mandated note
Integrated client-side Google Drive link auto-conversion to direct view links in profile.js so Google Drive images render perfectly in the gallery and profile
Applied stale-while-revalidate cache buster parameter to profile.js script imports to guarantee immediate updates
decisions: Persisted user edits and deletions to local server-side files to ensure changes remain highly stable and persistent even when external Google Sheet CSV is refetched
Forwarded update_profile request to Google Sheets App Script API in the background to sync edits to the core sheet database
Used a custom cache buster query parameter for static Javascript imports to bypass standard browser asset cache
Auto-converted Google Drive sharing link formats directly inside the client browser to maximize rendering compatibility
